testcase.name: test_checkout_returns_success_and_cancel_urls
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration13.py:65: in test_checkout_returns_success_and_cancel_urls assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"register failed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: register failed: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","username"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"Iter13 Chk","email":"TEST_iter13_chk_1778820708_e26bfc@test.com","password":"Passw0rd!","experience_years":1,"trading_style":"Scalping","preferred_markets":["Forex"],"bio":"iter13 checkout test"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","country_code"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"Iter13 Chk","email":"TEST_iter13_chk_1778820708_e26bfc@test.com","password":"Passw0rd!","experience_years":1,"trading_style":"Scalping","preferred_markets":["Forex"],"bio":"iter13 checkout test"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","contact_number"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"Iter13 Chk","email":"TEST_iter13_chk_1778820708_e26bfc@test.com","password":"Passw0rd!","experience_years":1,"trading_style":"Scalping","preferred_markets":["Forex"],"bio":"iter13 checkout test"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
